notes: 1U rackmount USB 3.0 audio interface with 188 channels total I/O. The optical MADI connector is physically an SC/FDDI duplex (multimode fiber), listed here as fiber-lc because the allowed connector enum has no SC-duplex value — the actual hardware uses SC connectors, not LC. Official RME spec lists 6 rear TRS line outputs (channels 3-8) plus 2 XLR monitor outputs (channels 1-2); the Sound on Sound review phrase 'octets of balanced line inputs and outputs' refers to the 8-channel routing group, not 8 identical TRS sockets — the XLR pair breaks the octet on the output side. Word Clock BNC ports are switchable to coaxial MADI I/O. The two rear USB-A ports serve DURec direct USB recording and optional ARC USB remote; both are USB 2.0 speed. Power via standard IEC C14 inlet feeding internal universal switching PSU (100-240V AC, 19-25W).

ports.name: Line In 1-8
ports.note: 8 balanced analog line inputs on rear panel, servo-balanced, +24dBu max

ports.name: Mic/Inst/Line In 9-12
ports.note: 4 front-panel combo XLR/TRS inputs (mic, instrument, or line), 75dB gain range

ports.name: Monitor Out 1-2
ports.note: 2 balanced XLR monitor outputs on rear panel, servo-balanced, +24dBu max

ports.name: Line Out 3-8
ports.note: 6 balanced TRS analog line outputs on rear panel, servo-balanced

ports.name: Phones 1
ports.note: Front-panel stereo headphone output, +19dBu, independent mix

ports.name: Phones 2
ports.note: Front-panel stereo headphone output, +19dBu, independent mix

ports.name: AES/EBU In
ports.note: Transformer-balanced AES/EBU digital input on rear panel

ports.name: AES/EBU Out
ports.note: Transformer-balanced AES/EBU digital output on rear panel

ports.name: ADAT In 1
ports.note: ADAT optical input; also usable as S/PDIF optical in

ports.name: ADAT Out 1
ports.note: ADAT optical output; also usable as S/PDIF optical out

ports.name: ADAT In 2
ports.note: ADAT optical input; also usable as S/PDIF optical in

ports.name: ADAT Out 2
ports.note: ADAT optical output; also usable as S/PDIF optical out

ports.name: MADI Optical In
ports.note: MADI optical input, 64 channels bidirectional; actual physical connector is SC/FDDI duplex (multimode 62.5/125 or 50/125), not LC — listed as fiber-lc as the closest available enum value

ports.name: MADI Optical Out
ports.note: MADI optical output, 64 channels; actual physical connector is SC/FDDI duplex (multimode), not LC

ports.name: Word Clock / MADI Coax In
ports.note: BNC Word Clock input, switchable to coaxial MADI input (75 Ohm)

ports.name: Word Clock / MADI Coax Out
ports.note: BNC Word Clock output, switchable to coaxial MADI output

ports.name: MIDI In (Front)
ports.note: 5-pin DIN MIDI input on front panel

ports.name: MIDI Out (Front)
ports.note: 5-pin DIN MIDI output on front panel

ports.name: MIDI In (Rear)
ports.note: 5-pin DIN MIDI input on rear panel

ports.name: MIDI Out (Rear)
ports.note: 5-pin DIN MIDI output on rear panel

ports.name: USB 3.0 Host
ports.note: Rear-panel USB Type-B 3.0 port for computer connection; also supports USB 2.0 mode (limited to non-MADI I/O)

ports.name: USB-A DURec (Front)
ports.note: Front-panel USB-A port for DURec direct recording to USB storage device

ports.name: USB-A ARC Remote (Rear)
ports.note: Rear-panel USB-A port for optional RME ARC USB advanced remote control unit

ports.name: AC Power
ports.note: IEC C14 power inlet; internal universal switching PSU, 100-240V AC, 19-25W
